prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson guild cloak and Mika Moonvale in a short guild cloak stand at a wooden table. Renji unrolls a detailed quest map across the surface. Mika leans in closely to inspect the parchment. Renji points to a specific location on the map with a confident expression. Cinematic lighting, vibrant anime aesthetic, no text, no watermarks, clear body action.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika Moonvale nods in agreement, tracing the route on the map with a finger, then looks up at Renji Dawnblade with a determined smile. Renji nods back, resting his hand on his broadsword hilt as they both prepare to depart for the quest. Consistent character appearances, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermarks.
